D sponsor must— 
(1) Require all pharmacies servicing 
long-term care facilities, as defined in 
§ 423.100 to— 
(i) Dispense solid oral doses of brand- 
name drugs, as defined in § 423.4, to en-
rollees in such facilities in no greater 
than 14-day increments at a time; 
(ii) Permit the use of uniform dis-
pensing techniques for Part D drugs 
dispensed to enrollees in long-term 
care facilities under paragraph (a)(1)(i) 
of this section as defined by each of the
